comment: Vig-free implied probabilities, refreshed 2026-06-10 evening ET (v2, pre-Stage-3 lock). All 8 R1 matches from Polymarket gamma API exact two-sided mids (each pair sums to 1.000, 1-cent spreads). GGbet cross-checks via aggregators agree within ~2pts where available (FURIA-B8 books ~0.715 vs PM 0.735; deeper PM book preferred per convention). v1 anchors (5 matches, 2026-06-09/10 GGbet + thin Polymarket) superseded.
